name: Vikram — CTO at a 200-person fintech, buys for the product org

goals: standardize how product decisions are documented
adopt AI without a data-leak headline
tools that reduce meetings, not add dashboards
frustrations: shadow AI usage he cannot govern
tools that demo well and die in month two
vendors who cannot answer where the data goes
profile.behaviour: Gives a product five minutes to prove it is architecturally serious. Probes the AI with a hard question to see if it bluffs. Checks for an offline story.
profile.riskTolerance: low for data, medium for workflow change
profile.preferredWorkflow: sees a team demo, asks security questions, delegates the pilot
profile.budgetSensitivity: low — signs team licenses without procurement below a threshold
profile.decisionStyle: buys for the team if one credible lead vouches after a pilot
expectedFeatures: answers that admit uncertainty instead of hallucinating
